channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-7560] Interop 2.5.5<->master :sanity-quota test_36: Migrate inode user limit failed: 3
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Saurabh Tandan <saurabh.tandan@intel.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/c7c10618-9fcc-11e5-a33d-5254006e85c2.

The sub-test test_36 failed with the following error:

Migrate inode user limit failed: 3

Test log:

Started clients shadow-47vm5.shadow.whamcloud.com,shadow-47vm6: 
CMD: shadow-47vm5.shadow.whamcloud.com,shadow-47vm6 mount | grep /mnt/lustre' '
shadow-47vm3@tcp:/lustre on /mnt/lustre type lustre (rw,user_xattr,flock)
shadow-47vm3@tcp:/lustre on /mnt/lustre type lustre (rw,user_xattr,flock)
CMD: shadow-47vm6 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests//usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests//usr/lib64/lustre/tests/../utils:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/lib64/qt-3.3/bin:/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin::/sbin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config sh rpc.sh set_default_debug \"vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super\" \"all -lnet -lnd -pinger\" 4 
CMD: shadow-47vm3 lctl get_param -n timeout
Using TIMEOUT=20
CMD: shadow-47vm3 lctl dl | grep ' IN osc ' 2>/dev/null | wc -l
CMD: shadow-47vm5.shadow.whamcloud.com lctl dl | grep ' IN osc ' 2>/dev/null | wc -l
Verify global limits...
CMD: shadow-47vm3 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n qmt.*.md-0x0.glb-usr
 sanity-quota test_36: @@@@@@ FAIL: Migrate inode user limit failed: 3

Looks similar to LU-7489
item.environment:
Server: Master, Build# 3266, Tag 2.7.64
Client: 2.5.5, b2_5_fe/62
item.summary: Interop 2.5.5<->master :sanity-quota test_36: Migrate inode user limit failed: 3

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

Another instance found for interop tag 2.7.66 - EL6.7 Server/2.7.1 Client, build# 3316
https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/6975b0f6-cc98-11e5-b80c-5254006e85c2

Another instance found for interop tag 2.7.66 - EL6.7 Server/2.5.5 Client, build# 3316
https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/d2ef9d92-cc9f-11e5-963e-5254006e85c2

Another instance found for interop : EL6.7 Server/2.5.5 Client
Server: master, build# 3303, RHEL 6.7
Client: 2.5.5, b2_5_fe/62
https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/35a4e8b0-bad6-11e5-9137-5254006e85c2

Another instance found for interop : EL6.7 Server/2.7.1 Client
Server: master, build# 3303, RHEL 6.7
Client: 2.7.1, b2_7_fe/34
https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/40967d0e-bad8-11e5-87b4-5254006e85c2
This issue has occurred around 22 times in past 30 days.

Another instance found for interop: EL7 Server/2.7.1 Client
Server: master, build# 3303, RHEL 7
Client: 2.7.1, b2_7_fe/34
https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/75e97574-bac4-11e5-9137-5254006e85c2

Another instance found for the following config:
Server: Master, build# 3276, RHEL 6.7
Client: 2.7.1 , b2_7_fe/34
https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/9f6f0fae-a592-11e5-a14a-5254006e85c2

Another instance found for :
Server: Master , Build# 3276 RHEL 7
Client: b2_7_fe/34
https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/19dc7c6a-a5a5-11e5-a14a-5254006e85c2

Server: Master, Build# 3266, Tag 2.7.64 , RHEL 7
Client: 2.5.5, b2_5_fe/62
https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/072c991a-a000-11e5-a33d-5254006e85c2
Yes we should fix this on the older maintenance branches still actively tested.

Quota migrating code has been removed from master (along with the s-q test_36, which is for quota migrating), so such test is invalid now.

Should we change the test script in old version for such kind of interoperability test?
